name: It's On The Mouse
short_description: Become the best tiny maid on the block! Help Holly and her friends in this little café manager where jumping and running are key to make up for your lack of size! Scuttle around the tables, serve your customers and be careful as dangerous obstacles and bosses will show up to try to stop you!
detailed_description:
"It's On The Mouse" is a Café Management game with a Platforming twist!

Jump and run around the tables to help Holly welcome her customers and serve them the right orders!

Prove yourself to be a great tiny maid to unlock new stages, each new stage adding something new to the game, including:

  • New Items, customers and even obstacles with unique mechanics to test your maid skills

  • Unlockable characters with their own skills and playstyle, including the adorable little Vtuber guests Ellie Minibot and FairyDuni

  • Not all stages are serving stages! Be careful as dangerous bosses will try their best to force little Holly to close her café!

And if you're tired of serving tables, don't worry as the unlockables will be there to offer you a well deserved break, including a minigame fitting a mouse!

All this and more awaits you in the game, so come visit Holly's café! And don't worry, the fun is on the mouse!

supported_languages:
English*, Italian, Japanese, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
